description:
About the job
We’re hiring a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join a growing, product-led SaaS company building scalable systems used at real-world scale. This is a hands-on role with strong ownership, and the opportunity to influence both architecture and engineering culture.

What you’ll do
Build, own, and evolve scalable, maintainable software in a SaaS environment
Collaborate closely with Product and Design to shape solutions from early concepts through to production
Mentor and pair with other engineers, driving quality and best practices across the codebase
Define feature scope, break down work, and iterate quickly to deliver value
Identify and improve bottlenecks that slow down developer productivity

What you’ll bring
5+ years of experience building scalable applications with Node.js and React
Solid understanding of service-oriented architectures, integration patterns, and messaging systems
Deep knowledge of backend systems and how services communicate over HTTP and via queues
Experience choosing the right data store for the job
Hands-on experience running services in containerised environments such as Kubernetes

The offer
Your manager is technical who values building products the right way
Join a company that takes a forward-thinking approach to technology across the entire organisation
Hybrid work arrangement - work from Sydney / Melbourne office + work from home
